description: The main commercial street of Gulangyu, featuring a variety of Minnan-style snacks and souvenir shops.
A maritime garden blending Chinese and Western styles, home to the Piano Museum with beautiful scenery.
The green lung of the city, an ecological park for birdwatching and flower viewing, offering views of the cross-sea bridge.
Xiamen's most bustling commercial street, known for its arcade-style architecture and a hub for shopping and dining.
A modern seaside resort area with well-equipped beach facilities and expansive, magnificent sea views.
The site of the Zheng Chenggong Statue, a coastal park with scenic views and a memorial to the national hero.
One of the most beautiful university campuses in China, seamlessly combining red-brick Jiageng architecture with modern campus design.
A natural beach loved by Xiamen locals, featuring fine sand, clear waters, and a relatively quiet atmosphere.
A large park showcasing the essence of domestic and international garden art, with rich wetland ecology.
A famous Minnan Buddhist temple with a long history, located at the foot of Wulao Peak, known for its thriving incense offerings.
The mausoleum of Mr. Chen Jiageng, a cultural landscape park integrating commemoration, gardens, and sea views.
Xiamen's most beautiful coastline, a paradise for cycling with coconut breezes and a popular photography spot.
A group of educational institutions founded by Mr. Chen Jiageng, featuring unique Jiageng architectural style and profound cultural heritage.
Xiamen's emerging cultural and creative hub, gathering art studios, cafés, and trendy shops.
Xiamen's most popular urban beach, perfect for enjoying sea views, sunsets, and relaxation.
